summary: Game Bank feature fully tested. Backend API: 40/40 tests passed. Frontend: All 6 game types display correctly, games load and are playable. Progress tracking imports verified in BeginnerCourse and AdvancedMasteryCourse.

lint_warnings.issue: setState in useEffect (line 24) - minor performance warning

critical_code_review_comments: Game Bank API (/api/games/*) is well-structured with 6 game types and 6 vocabulary topics
All game generators produce valid game data with correct structure
Score submission endpoint correctly calculates stars (0-3) based on percentage
Frontend GameBank.js has all 6 game components implemented (MatchingPairsGame, SpellingBeeGame, TrueFalseGame, WordRaceGame, LuckyWheelGame, FishingGame)
Progress tracking correctly imported in BeginnerCourse.js and AdvancedMasteryCourse.js
seed_data_creation: None - Game Bank uses static vocabulary data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Game Bank feature fully functional. 6 game types: Matching Pairs, Spelling Bee, True/False, Word Race, Lucky Wheel, Fishing Trip. 6 vocabulary topics: family, food, animals, colors, numbers, school. Frontend route: /game-bank. Backend routes: /api/games/list, /api/games/play/{game_type}, /api/games/submit/{game_id}. Progress tracking added to BeginnerCourse and AdvancedMasteryCourse.

matching_pairs_api.details: Generates word-meaning pairs with 120s time limit

spelling_bee_api.details: Generates scrambled words with hints, 180s time limit

word_race_api.details: Generates multiple choice questions, 60s time limit

lucky_wheel_api.details: Generates questions with point values (10-50), no time limit

fishing_api.details: Generates fish catching game, 120s time limit

frontend_game_selection.details: All 6 game types displayed with icons and descriptions

frontend_topic_selection.details: All 6 topics available as buttons (Family, Food, Animals, Colors, Numbers, School)

frontend_matching_pairs_game.details: 16 cards displayed (8 pairs), flip and match mechanics working

frontend_true_false_game.details: TRUE/FALSE buttons displayed, question counter and score visible

progress_tracking_beginner.details: Imports markSectionComplete, getLessonProgress, isLessonCompleted, getCourseProgress, isSectionCompleted, markLessonComplete

progress_tracking_advanced.details: Imports markSectionComplete, getLessonProgress, isLessonCompleted, getCourseProgress, isSectionCompleted, markLessonComplete

app_route.details: Route added in App.js line 294, renders GameBank component

known_issues.session_persistence: Pre-existing bug - login session may be lost when navigating directly to pages
